title: Our Year End Goals | #shorts
full_text: This is how if anybody thinks how do you film a family episode, you're seeing it live right now. >> I have said many times that if he doesn't step up and starts getting either much more involved, we should hire a replacement. >> I mean, you know, I lied. I was trying. >> Is that your only goal? >> No, I was supposed to drink water also, but we won't get into that. >> You have no solution in mind. >> No, I was Well, he may have been influenced by >> Well, clearly She might be lying to you, Dad. >> She doesn't want you to go. >> Never say I'll see or I'll get back to you when you know the answer is no. Getting angry to the point of having a concussion right now, but I'm choosing not to.
